# main-base-claude-code

> Claude Code project template with inception agent, specialized subagents, and quality-enforced workflows.

## What this repo is

A GitHub template that bootstraps any software project with 6 pre-configured Claude Code layers:
an inception agent that runs structured discovery before any code is written, specialized subagents
for different engineering domains, quality-enforced hooks, and persistent context management.

## How to use this repo

- To start a new project: install skill/SKILL.md globally, then run /inception "your idea"
- To resume interrupted work: /inception --resume
- To analyze existing repo: /inception --analyze ./path

## Key files for LLMs

- machine-readable/index.yaml — structured index of all agents, skills, commands, hooks
- skill/SKILL.md — inception agent orchestrator (main entry point)
- skill/challenge-system.md — 3-level challenge protocol
- skill/resume-protocol.md — session recovery logic
- skill/analyze-protocol.md — existing repo analysis
- skill/bootstrap.md — project bootstrapping via gh CLI
- skill/stack-selector.md — stack → skills/agents mapping
- .claude/agents/ — 5 specialized agents
- .claude/commands/ — slash commands for Git workflow
- .claude/settings.json — hooks configuration
- docs/decisions/ — Architecture Decision Records

## Architecture principles

- Screaming Architecture + explicit ports (not pure Hexagonal)
- Ports mandatory when module has >1 external dependency
- CLI over MCP always (gh CLI for git, bash for filesystem)
- Progressive artifact generation (REQUIREMENTS → ARCHITECTURE → PLAN → CLAUDE.md)
- Context compaction at 50%, not 95%

## Primary stack target

Python + FastAPI + SQLAlchemy async + Alembic + Pydantic v2

## Related resources

- claude-mem plugin: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem (persistent memory, AGPL-3.0)
- Claude Code Ultimate Guide: https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
- Claude Code docs: https://code.claude.com/docs
